subject: Launch gate follow-up
body: Recap: meeting target was June 20, but this was not final until security and finance completed review.

subject: Decision update: launch date
body: Decision update: launch date moves to July 15, 2026. Please treat the June 20 date as superseded.

subject: Customer notice owner
body: I remain owner for the customer notice. New due date is June 5 so the notice aligns with the July launch.

subject: Support rotation still open
body: Support rotation owner remains unresolved. We need an operations staffing decision before launch readiness can be complete.
